criteria.label: Identify the local choice and the sort key for a candidate greedy.
criteria.example: Activity selection: local choice = next activity that starts ≥ last end; sort key = end time.

criteria.label: Sanity-check greedy against brute force or DP on small inputs before trusting it.
criteria.example: Stress test 10k random small cases of coin change for `greedy(case) == optimal(case)`.

criteria.label: Recognize when greedy fails and switch to DP.
criteria.example: 0/1 knapsack: greedy by value/weight ratio fails; use bottom-up DP `dp[i][w]`.

criteria.label: Implement priority-queue-driven greedies (Dijkstra, Huffman) correctly.
criteria.example: Dijkstra: `heapq.heappush(pq, (dist, node))`; pop, finalize, relax edges.

criteria.label: Distinguish heuristic greedies from provably optimal ones and measure quality for the former.
criteria.example: Greedy decoding is heuristic; evaluate against beam search and top-p sampling on the same eval set.
